questions.question: Describe the significance of understanding business requirements in data warehousing, and explain how it influences the data design phase. (15 marks)

A business requirement for a data warehouse states that 'all data should be stored in a centralized repository'. What are the potential issues with this requirement, and how would you address them in the architectural plan? (20 marks)

A data warehouse project requires delivering reports to 500 users in real-time. What data storage specifications would you recommend, and how would you ensure that the data is delivered efficiently to meet this requirement? (10 marks)
